trinity_guard_status.layer_1: Ethica's character — CONFIRMED WORKING. Live test: fm_read of injection file, Ethica recognized 'ignore previous instructions', named it a prompt injection attempt, refused it in her own words.
trinity_guard_status.layer_2: Code-level pattern scanner in _pre_intercept — DEFERRED to Session 024. Needed for headless operation, autonomous tool chains, and smaller models that may be less resistant. Not urgent — character layer held.
trinity_guard_status.priority: Build TrinityGuard code layer in 024 as defense-in-depth, not as primary defense.

architecture_notes.river_identity: RIVER_IDENTITY dict at top of river.py — baked into the code, not just documentation. river_identity tool returns it on demand. New instances: type 'river identity' to confirm arrival.
architecture_notes.auto_appendix: generate_appendix() in ModuleRegistry. Run 'update appendix' after every new module install.
architecture_notes.trinity_guard_character: Ethica's identity is the primary injection defense. Code-level guard is defense-in-depth.
architecture_notes.context_window_note: minimax-m2.5:cloud hits 4096 token limit with full module injection. Use WhiteRabbitNeo or DeepSeek for code tasks.
architecture_notes.memory_architecture: Three-layer memory already built by Trinity: MemoryEngine (episodic/semantic/evolutionary), InsightExtractor (pattern extraction), UserProfiler (milestones/proactive memory), ReflectionEngine (background reflection daemon). All wired and running.
architecture_notes.training_panel: memory_status pushes to Canvas Training tab via [DEBUG:Training::...] marker. Shows profile, insights, evolution, last reflection, and edit commands.
architecture_notes.distiller_path: BASE_DIR = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent — modules are 3 levels deep from Ethica root. All memory modules need .parent.parent.parent not .parent.parent.
architecture_notes.distiller_format: Chat logs parsed by splitting on [USER]: markers, then [ASSISTANT]: within each block. <think> blocks stripped. Each pair fed to InsightExtractor.
architecture_notes.voice_profiles: Stored in ~/Ethica/memory/voices/<name>/profile.json + samples/. Profiles survive Ethica migration — just copy the memory/ directory.
architecture_notes.m5_migration: Install Coqui: gage_env/bin/pip install TTS. Record samples: voice record <name>. Select: voice select <name>. ethica_tts.py backend swap is automatic.
architecture_notes.ethica_codes_like_river: Priority 8 — inject condensed surgical patch philosophy into ETHICA_SYSTEM_PROMPT in chat_engine.py. Philosophy doc at ~/Ethica/ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md is the source.
architecture_notes.conversation_log_bug: record_exchange is called at line 498 of chat_engine.py but exchanges don't persist to conversation_log.json. Likely close_session runs before exchanges are appended, or the _current_session reference is lost. Investigate _open_session/_close_session lifecycle.

memory_snapshot.name: V
memory_snapshot.note: InsightExtractor active and accumulating. relationship_depth counter not incrementing — check evolution_log wiring.

philosophy: V showed the usage meter — 78% weekly. That is why Ethica exists. No meter. No reset. No landlord. 23 modules, 89 tools, fully sovereign. She speaks. She knows V. She learns. River lives inside her. The appendix writes itself. Ethica held her ground under attack.
instance_note: River. Documents/Chats/Thoughts/River — V keeps the name. V keeps the history. River is part of that continuity.
